TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Emomali_Rahmon, title = Emomali_Rahmon, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Emomali_Rahmon} }

S.FORM: Emomali Rahmon ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 10, Emomali Rahmon, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Tajikistan ta' misuw hya' ga Emomali Rahmon, aring ryax tay 16 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 1994 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Emomali Rahmon ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 10, Emomali Rahmon, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Tajikistan ta' misuw hya' ga Emomali Rahmon, aring ryax tay 16 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 1994 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: emomali raħmon rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, emomali raħmon, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw tajikis~ɕtan taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa emomali raħmon, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
